articles.author: Sean O'Kane
articles.title: Rivian’s factory hit by tornado ahead of R2 launch - TechCrunch
articles.description: Nobody was hurt after an EF-1 tornado hit the part of the factory where the R2 SUV is supposed to be built.
articles.content: Rivian’s factory in Normal, Illinois was directly hit by a tornado and sustained damage over the weekend, the company has confirmed to TechCrunch. Nobody was injured, according to Rivian, and staff a… [+2636 chars]
